title: Kickstarter Pre-Launch Follower Tracker
description: Track the "Notify Me" follower count and project details from any Kickstarter pre-launch page. Perfect for monitoring your campaign's pre-launch growth daily.

url.title: Kickstarter Project URL
url.description:
URL of the Kickstarter project page (pre-launch or live). Accepts both pre-launch pages and standard project URLs.

Example: https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/creator-name/project-name

waitForSelectorTimeout.title: Page Load Timeout (ms)
waitForSelectorTimeout.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for the page to render. Increase if you experience timeout errors on slow connections.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings for the browser. Residential proxies are recommended for best stability with Kickstarter.
proxyConfiguration.sectionDescription: Configure proxy and timeout settings for more reliable scraping.
